title: Reproducibility materials for an eight-gene hypoxia/proliferation-immune activation expression axis study in lung adenocarcinoma
description: Sanitized reproducibility materials for a public multi-cohort lung adenocarcinoma transcriptomic study. The package contains the complete TCGA-LUAD discovery workflow, the 28-gene retained/not-retained provenance record, locked-score external-cohort analyses, derived result tables, probe mappings, figure source data, rendered figures, clean-run verification, and environment documentation. It excludes raw public source matrices, controlled-access content, patient-identifying information, manuscript-submission files, and credentials.
